overview: This small frog has bumpy, mottled brown skin and distinct dark eyes. It likely lives in or near rocky, perennial streams. Its diet consists of terrestrial and aquatic invertebrates like flies, beetles, and ants. The species appears consistent with a Foothill Yellow-legged Frog (Rana boylii). This small frog has bumpy, mottled brown skin and distinct dark eyes.
It likely lives in or near rocky, perennial streams.
Its diet consists of terrestrial and aquatic invertebrates like flies, beetles, and ants.
The species appears consistent with a Foothill Yellow-legged Frog (Rana boylii).
